data.title: $3.5M exploit hits Sui-based Volo Protocol, leading to frozen assets and ongoing fund recovery efforts after hack.
data.description: Volo Protocol recently announced the occurrence of a $3.5 million exploit impacting specific vaults. The company has taken immediate action by freezing assets and initiating the process of recovering the funds. Investigations into the incident are currently ongoing.

data.title: Danske Mortgage Bank Plc to release Interim Report for H1 2026 on specified date.
data.description: More than 10,000 people in the city were affected by a recent power outage that lasted for over 12 hours. The outage was caused by a damaged transformer near the main power station. Residents in the affected areas were left without electricity during the night, with temperatures dropping below freezing. Emergency services responded to over 50 calls related to the outage, including requests for medical assistance and reports of suspicious activity. Local officials have apologized for the inconvenience and assured residents that steps are being taken to prevent similar outages in the future.

data.title: Culture Hive Media Group Introduces Cultural Relevance Score™ to Help Brands Measure What Makes Advertising Resonate
data.description: Culture Hive Media Group has introduced a new platform that utilizes AI technology to provide brands with a unique scoring system for evaluating cultural relevance in advertising campaigns. The platform aims to eliminate the need for guesswork and enable brands to substantiate the resonance of their ads. The advisory board boasts ex-executives from GroupM, offering valuable industry insights and expertise.

data.title: Cape Cod Wastewater Treatment Plant Expanded to Meet Environment Guidelines - with Penetron Technology
data.description: In April 2026, the "Teaticket Acapesket Sewer Area" (TASA) project in Falmouth, Massachusetts was successfully finished. This initiative involved enlarging the sewer system and upgrading the local wastewater treatment plant. To safeguard the infrastructure, PENETRON ADMIX SB, a specialized crystalline waterproofing admixture, was chosen.

data.title: Quintus Flexform™ Press Enables Sona SPEED to Deliver Flight-Critical Aerospace Components Faster
data.description: VÄSTERÅS, Sweden - April 22, 2026 - Sona SPEED Pvt. Ltd., a company specializing in precision mechatronics manufacturing solutions, has announced advancements in forming technology that enhance precision manufacturing for high-performance industries worldwide. These advancements have not only strengthened their manufacturing capabilities but have also resulted in a significant reduction in lead times. This development demonstrates Sona SPEED Pvt. Ltd.'s commitment to efficiency and innovation in the global market.

data.title: Atos leads, delivering global DanceSport Federation GrandSlam events with success.
data.description: In the latest report, it has been confirmed that there has been a significant increase in the unemployment rate, which now stands at 6.7%. This marks a notable rise from the previous month's rate of 6.2%. The number of individuals filing for unemployment benefits has also surged to 900,000, showcasing the ongoing economic challenges faced by many during these uncertain times. Additionally, the report highlights a decrease in job creation, with only 49,000 jobs added in the past month, falling short of the expected target. These figures serve as a stark reminder of the continued impact of the pandemic on the job market and the overall economy.

data.title: Trade In Your Old Car with Ease at Carizma Motors in Lubbock, TX
data.description: Carizma Motors, located in Lubbock, Texas, is providing a user-friendly trade-in service to assist customers in exchanging their old vehicles for value towards a new upgrade. As of April 22, 2026, the dealership in Lubbock, TX, aims to simplify the process for drivers looking to transition to a newer car model, offering a convenient experience for customers.

data.title: Justin Sun is taking legal action against World Liberty Financial for freezing his tokens and stripping his voting rights. Sun claims his holdings are being threatened and is seeking justice.
data.description: The founder of Tron has claimed that World Liberty has frozen his tokens, revoked his voting rights, and even threatened to burn his holdings. As a result, he has decided to take legal action and is suing the company.

data.title: 'Greener Data - Volume Three' Launches on Amazon to Drive Education and Collaboration on Decarbonizing the Digital Infrastructure Revolution
data.description: A recently released book includes insights from over 75 global experts offering guidance for achieving sustainability in AI, next-generation data centers, and environmentally friendly networks. The book launch coincided with Earth Day celebrations in Las Vegas on April 22, 2026. JSA, a renowned global marketing agency specializing in the digital infrastructure sector, spearheaded this initiative.

data.title: Brand Engagement Network Expands into Fleet Operations with Accelevate Investment and BEN's Newly Granted Patent
data.description: Brand Engagement Network, Inc. (NASDAQ: BNAI), based in Wilmington, Del., unveiled plans to enhance real-time AI implementation in commercial fleet systems and introduce a fresh in-vehicle enterprise communication platform on April 22, 2026. The company revealed a new strategic investment aimed at bolstering these initiatives.

data.title: Taylor Morrison Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Scottsdale, Arizona on April 22, 2026, Taylor Morrison Home Corporation, a prominent national community developer and homebuilder, shared their first quarter results for the period concluding on March 31, 2026. During this quarter, they reported a net income of $99 million, equal to $1.01 per share.

data.title: 0.09% Biblically Responsible ETF Outperforms S&P 500 Index in Two Years Since Launch
data.description: In Boise, Idaho, on April 22, 2026, Inspire Investing, recognized as the leading provider of Christian ETFs globally as of December 31, 2025, marks the 2nd year since the launch of the innovative Inspire 500 ETF (NYSE: PTL). This ETF, specifically aimed at large-cap companies and adhering to faith-based principles, offers investors a cost-effective option for core U.S. equity investments.

data.title: OTIS REPORTS FIRST QUARTER 2026 RESULTS
data.description: Otis reports a 6% increase in net sales, primarily fueled by the Service segment which saw growth across all business lines. Specifically, net sales rose by 6% overall and organic sales increased by 1%. Within the Service category, net sales surged by 11% with organic sales up by 5%. Moreover, Repair net sales witnessed a remarkable 16% increase, with organic repair sales seeing a growth of around 10%.
